name: powershell-safety
description: PowerShell safety rules — file encoding pitfalls (BOM, UTF-16 LE vs UTF-8), native executable piping, quoting, and destructive command patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Encoding pitfalls, BOM handling, quoting, and command safety for PowerShell on Windows
interface.longDescription: Prevents the most common PowerShell accidents in AI-generated code: file encoding mismatches (BOM in .c/.h/.json), broken pipes to native executables, garbled CJK text, and destructive command patterns. Covers Windows PowerShell 5.1 and PowerShell 7+ with exact cmdlet-level encoding defaults and symptom diagnostics.
